info.title: Contact Enricher API
info.description: Contact Enricher API. Enrich contacts with company, job title, and social profile data. Send a JSON POST request through api.market and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, and authentication are handled by api.market plans.

post.description: Enrich contacts with company, job title, and social profile data.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.
